why: The current formula is too loose compared with the historical pre-breakout fingerprint. It allows weak candle quality and overly wide EMA20 distance.

thresholdChanges.reason: Historical winners show stronger volume support than the current threshold requires.
The current distance band is too wide and may admit stocks that are already extended.
Breakout candidates should show stronger closing pressure near the high.

addFilters: Consider a future filter for avoiding abnormal last-candle range expansion before entry.
notes: This is only an example file to show the expected shape for manual AI revisions.
